mapper.select: SELECT p.performance_employee_id AS employeeId, COALESCE(SUM(p.point_amount), 0) AS totalPoint FROM batch_projection.performance_point_projection p GROUP BY p.performance_employee_id

SELECT p.performance_employee_id AS employeeId, COALESCE(SUM(p.point_amount), 0) AS totalPoint FROM batch_projection.performance_point_projection p WHERE p.point_earned_date >= #{startDate} AND p.point_earned_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY p.performance_employee_id
